_source: Typical adult per-dose ranges from FDA prescribing information, curated to the medications appearing in data/synthetic/sample_referrals.json plus common home-health medications. Used by the document pipeline Layer 5 Validation Agent to flag OCR-corrupted dosages (e.g. Metformin 50000mg).
_note: Ranges are per single dose in mg, intentionally wide — they catch order-of-magnitude OCR errors, not clinical dosing decisions.
